author: Executor / Claude
related_files: AI_DISPATCH_AUTOMATION.md — corrected stale queue-runner overview / file-components table / §1 narrative / §17.4 / §18.1 / §18.6 / closing paragraph so they describe the mode-aware ISSUE-239 default PR publish posture and do not claim default queue runs fast-forward / push `origin/main` / auto-publish; explicit `main` mode is described as the opt-in path that fast-forwards and pushes `origin/main`. Also rewrote the design-invariant "Auto-publish gate" bullet as a neutral "Publish gate" bullet.

Invoke-AiDispatchQueue.ps1 — rewrote `Write-DispatchLog` process-trace step 6 to enumerate the three resolved-`-PublishMode` outcomes (default `pr` pushes the dispatch branch + opens a PR without pushing `origin/main` or closing the source issue; explicit `main` fast-forwards and pushes `origin/main`; `branch` / `-NoPublish` leaves the work on the branch). Replaced the unconditional "Publish policy: auto-push to origin/main" line in the generated dispatch-commit message with mode-aware policy wording covering the same three modes.
